audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Exodus / Shemot covenant ratification text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for covenant ratification, blood of covenant, elders seeing Divine, sapphire pavement, Moses on mountain forty days.

verses.restored: And to Moses he said, Come up to YHWH, you and Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, and seventy elders of Israel, and you shall worship from afar.
Moses alone shall come near to YHWH, but they shall not come near, and the people shall not go up with him.
Moses came and recounted to the people all words of YHWH and all judgments/ordinances; all the people answered with one voice and said, All the words that YHWH has spoken we will do.
Moses wrote all words of YHWH. He rose early in morning and built altar under mountain and twelve standing-stones for twelve tribes of Israel.
He sent young men of children of Israel, and they offered burnt offerings and sacrificed peace offerings of bulls to YHWH.
Moses took half the blood/life and put in basins, and half the blood/life he dashed against altar.
He took scroll of covenant and read in ears of people; they said, All that YHWH has spoken we will do and we will hear/listen.
Moses took the blood/life and sprinkled upon the people and said, Look, blood/life of covenant that YHWH cut with you concerning all these words.
Moses and Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, and seventy elders of Israel went up.
They saw Divine of Israel, and under his feet like work of sapphire brick, and like substance of heavens for purity.
Against nobles of children of Israel he did not send his hand; they beheld the Divine, and they ate and drank.
YHWH said to Moses, Come up to me on mountain and be there, and I will give you tablets of stone, Torah/instruction and command that I wrote, to teach them.
Moses rose, and Joshua his attendant; Moses went up to mountain of the Divine.
To the elders he said, Sit for us here until we return to you. Look, Aaron and Hur are with you; whoever has matters, let him approach them.
Moses went up to mountain, and cloud covered the mountain.
Glory of YHWH dwelt upon Mount Sinai, and cloud covered it six days; on seventh day he called to Moses from midst of cloud.
Appearance of glory of YHWH was like consuming fire on top of mountain before eyes of children of Israel.
Moses came into midst of cloud and went up mountain; Moses was on mountain forty days and forty nights.

translation_notes: Covenant ratification includes words spoken, words written, altar, twelve stones, offerings, blood/life, and people's response.
'We will do and we will hear/listen' preserves na'aseh venishma resonance.
Seeing Divine and eating/drinking is extraordinary covenant fellowship; preserve without over-systematizing.
Sapphire brick/pavement echoes Egypt brick language transformed into heavenly purity imagery.
safety_note: Blood of covenant is ancient ritual life-symbolism and must not be sensationalized. Covenant is ratified around liberation, instruction, shared response, and fellowship before Divine.
